steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The question asks to emphasize the LOCATION of the figures in A Promise. The notes specifically identify that in A Promise, two men are “floating on the left side of the canvas” — this spatial positioning is the focal detail.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: Choice A directly centers on the figures' location by stating “two men are depicted on the left side of the canvas.” The other three emphasize size, mood, or water color instead. That matches choice A — A is correct.
